summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Privacy/Visibility System for golf tournament app. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified visibility badges, dropdowns, invite codes, and access denied states across Admin Panel, Challenges, Tours, and Leaderboard pages.
passed_tests: POST /api/tournaments creates tournament with visibility='private' by default and generates invite_code
POST /api/tournaments with visibility='public' creates a public tournament
GET /api/tournaments returns only public tournaments for unauthenticated users
GET /api/tournaments returns all tournaments for admin users
GET /api/tournaments/invite/{invite_code} resolves tournament by invite code
Invalid invite code returns 404
GET /api/leaderboard/{id} works for public tournaments without auth
GET /api/leaderboard/{id} returns 403 for private tournaments when user is not authenticated
GET /api/leaderboard/{id} returns 403 for private tournaments when user is not a participant
GET /api/leaderboard/{id} works for admin on private tournaments
POST /api/challenges creates challenge with visibility and invite_code
GET /api/challenges returns empty for unauthenticated users (all default private)
GET /api/challenges returns public + user's challenges for logged-in users
GET /api/challenges/invite/{invite_code} resolves challenge by invite code
POST /api/tours creates tour with visibility field and invite_code
POST /api/tours with visibility='public' creates public tour
GET /api/tours returns only public/user's tours
GET /api/tours/invite/{invite_code} resolves tour by invite code
Admin Panel shows Private/Public badges on tournament cards
Admin Panel tournament create dialog has Visibility dropdown defaulting to Private
Challenges page create dialog has visibility dropdown defaulting to Private
Tours page shows Private/Public badges on cards
Tours create dialog has visibility dropdown defaulting to Private
Public Leaderboard shows access denied state with Lock icon for private tournaments
seed_data_creation: Created test tournaments, challenges, and tours with TEST_ prefix during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Privacy/Visibility system fully implemented and tested. All items default to 'private' visibility. Invite codes are 6-character uppercase strings. Access control works correctly for leaderboards - 403 returned for private tournaments when user is not authenticated or not a participant. Frontend shows Lock/Globe badges, invite code copy buttons, and visibility dropdowns in all create forms.
